title: Introduction
text:
I am a graduate student at Boston University pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics.
I have professional experience in data analytics and audit through my role at Citigroup, where I support reporting, regulatory requirements, and business insights.
My background combines business knowledge with data skills, allowing me to translate data into actionable insights.
